title: CenTdemeern1's Family & Friends pack
description: CenTdemeern1's modpack used in the SMP we play with family & friends.
body:
This modpack was specifically made for CenTdemeern1's "Family & Friends SMP".
The goal with this pack is to add some mods that don't inhibit the vanilla experience if you want to avoid them.

While this pack has a very specific obvious target audience, feel free to try the pack if you stuble upon it. I'm not going to stop you. (The main reason it's public is ease of updating)

Notable additions:
- Create (with a few add-ons)
- Chisels & Bits and a few furniture mods
- Simple Voice Chat
